title: peristylus intrudens
intro: Peristylus intrudens, also known as the golden ground orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Peristylus intrudens include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Peristylus intrudens can be made by infusing the roots in hot water or by mixing the dried plant material with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various health benefits.
